text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The cherry blossoms are in full bloom for this
year's Oka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Who will win the tiara today? Only time will tell!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hishi Amazon... She ran in the Hanshin J.F., right?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Apparently. I heard she's a strong contender for
the Triple Tiara this year.

There's quite a number of spectators in the stands
who are looking forward to seeing Hishi Amazon
race.

Meanwhile, Hishi Amazon herself is a little
distracted.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ack! Sorry about that. I just zoned out for a
second!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well... Don't laugh at what I'm about to tell you,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know I chose the Tiara to prove I was worthy of
challenging Brian and all, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've come all this way, it feels like...
I'unno.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I kinda feel like I was meant for this path—that
this is the start of a whole new me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Man, what am I even saying?! Forget all of that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta focus on winning this first! Here I go,
full steam ahead!

Hishi Amazon heads into the Oka Sho with a
wide, courageous grin!
